subtopicsString: Elements of a Communication System, Types of Communication Systems (Analog and Digital), Electromagnetic Spectrum and Frequency Bands, Signal Characteristics (Bandwidth, Power, SNR), Noise in Communication Systems, Amplitude Modulation (AM, DSB-SC, SSB, VSB), Frequency Modulation (FM), Phase Modulation (PM), Modulators and Demodulators for Analog Systems, Noise Performance of Analog Modulation Systems, Sampling and Quantization (PCM, DPCM, Delta Modulation), Line Coding and Pulse Shaping, Amplitude Shift Keying (ASK), Frequency Shift Keying (FSK), Phase Shift Keying (PSK, QPSK, M-PSK), Quadrature Amplitude Modulation (QAM), Error Probability Analysis for Digital Modulation, Measure of Information (Entropy, Mutual Information), Channel Capacity (Shannon-Hartley Theorem), Source Coding (Huffman Coding, Lempel-Ziv), Channel Coding (Block Codes, Cyclic Codes, Convolutional Codes), Error Detection and Correction Techniques, Antennas and Wave Propagation, Transmitters and Receivers Architectures, Multiple Access Techniques (FDMA, TDMA, CDMA, OFDMA), Introduction to Optical Fiber Communication, Introduction to Wireless Communication Standards (e.g., GSM, LTE, 5G)
